name: barkdown-house-rules
description: House rules for `fallow guard` / `fallow audit`. barkdown's runtime surface is the declared marked peer pair and nothing else — these rules keep src/ free of Node builtins and direct DOM-library imports (all DOM access goes through the adapter seam).

rules.message: Core must stay platform-neutral: no Node builtins in src/. DOM access goes through the DomAdapter seam.
No hard runtime dependency on any DOM library. Consumers pass their own document via documentAdapter(); happy-dom and linkedom are devDependencies for tests only.
